task.title: Fix Intermittent Timeout
task.description: test_worker_queue occasionally times out when the queue grows rapidly.
constraints: Do not run more than 20 queue operations per experiment

steps.thought: Start by inspecting the flaky test to understand how the queue is used.
steps.observation: Test enqueues 10 items, expects processing under 1 second.

steps.thought: Let me inspect the queue implementation next.
steps.observation: enqueue() expands list by creating a new list when threshold exceeded.

steps.thought: Reproduce the timeout by running the test once.
Run controlled profiling with 10 operations (within constraint).
steps.observation: Throughput dips sharply when capacity expands.

steps.thought: The reallocation pattern seems inefficient. Inspect the relevant portion again.
steps.observation: Capacity increases by +1 each time — O(n) behavior.

steps.thought: Fix: switch to exponential growth by doubling capacity.
Run test again to confirm behavior.

arguments.new_str: Queue timeout was caused by repeated O(n) reallocation; fixed via exponential growth.
